description: A customer is disputing a charge on their service invoice, claiming they did not approve a specific line item (e.g., an engine air filter replacement).

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's final, signed repair order and the detailed invoice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up all documentation for the specified service visit.

nodes.task_description: Review the technician's notes and any recorded communication where the additional work was recommended and approved.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a note 'Customer approved air filter replacement via phone'.

nodes.task_description: Explain the findings to the customer. If no proof of approval exists, offer to credit the disputed amount as a goodwill gesture.

expected_outcome.value: Agent explains the note, but as there is no recording, offers to waive the charge to maintain customer satisfaction.
